--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Malka accepted the enclosed draft of the Release
Agreement. Please note
that the agreement is now reciprocal in that it
contains releases from Malka, as
well as from Gil Koppel, Walter Novembre and Ohio
Coffee, LLC. Note also
that although Malka also releases LHW and ASW, he
does not get a release from
them.

May I have your permission to forward this to Walter
to get it signed by him
and Gil?

Thanks.

Darren
